2606.04155.title: SocialCoach: Personalized Social Skill Learning with RL-based Agentic Tutoring and Practice
2606.04155.paper_summary: Social skills such as negotiation and leadership are crucial for personal and professional success in today's interconnected world. However, scalable and effective training remains a significant challenge due to the scarcity of expert coaching. In this paper, we introduce SocialCoach, a holistic LLM-powered agentic tutoring system for personalized social skill development at scale. First, SocialCoach automatically constructs a pedagogically-grounded, theory-to-practice knowledge corpus from diverse expert sources, leveraging a multi-agent pipeline. Second, to personalize the learning journey, it employs an adaptive practice scheduling module that follows a prescription-retrieval-adaptation process. To maximize the long-term learning experience while overcoming the cold-start problem, this policy is optimized within a learner simulation environment through reinforcement learning. Finally, SocialCoach integrates immersive, goal-driven practice, causality-driven proficiency assessment and knowledge-grounded, reflective tutoring to help address the knowing-doing gap. We deploy it in our product, EQoach, and conduct extensive experiments. The results show that SocialCoach improves simulated pathway quality and judge-rated tutoring quality over baseline approaches, while early user feedback indicates strong perceived engagement and usefulness. These findings suggest a practical architecture for personalized and gamified pedagogical platforms on soft skill learning.
2606.04155.paper_summary_zh: 社交技能如談判和領導力在當今互聯互通的世界中對個人和職業成功至關重要。<lb/>然而，由於專家教練的稀缺，可擴展和有效的培訓仍然是一個重大挑戰。<lb/>在本文中，我們介紹了SocialCoach，一個全面的基於大型語言模型的代理教學系統，旨在大規模個性化社交技能發展。<lb/>首先，SocialCoach自動從多樣的專家來源構建一個以教學為基礎的理論到實踐的知識庫，利用多代理管道。<lb/>其次，為了個性化學習旅程，它採用一個自適應練習排程模組，遵循處方檢索適應過程。<lb/>為了在克服冷啟動問題的同時最大化長期學習體驗，這一政策在學習者模擬環境中通過強化學習進行優化。<lb/>最後，SocialCoach整合了沉浸式、以目標為驅動的練習、基於因果關係的能力評估和以知識為基礎的反思性教學，以幫助解決知識與行動之間的差距。<lb/>我們在我們的產品EQoach中部署了它，並進行了廣泛的實驗。<lb/>結果顯示，SocialCoach在模擬路徑質量和評審評價的教學質量上超過了基準方法，而早期用戶反饋表明強烈的參與感和實用性。<lb/>這些發現為個性化和遊戲化的軟技能學習教學平台提供了一個實用的架構。
2606.04155.author: Tianfu Wang et.al.
2606.04155.authors: Tianfu Wang, Max Xiong, Jianxun Lian, Hongyuan Zhu, Zhengyu Hu, Yuxuan Lei, Linxiao Gong, Xiaofang Li, Peiting Tsai, Nicholas Jing Yuan, Qi Zhang
